name: Vaya
description: The singer who composed the Song of the Cracked Stone. Fifty, sharp-eyed, walks with a limp from a fall crossing the Ashfield twenty years ago. The fall is why she started composing — three months recovering with nothing to do but listen. Not a leader. The Rootwalkers don't have leaders. But her songs spread faster than anyone else's, and that is its own kind of authority.
